cases.description: OWASP vulnerability scan triggers full analysis
cases.prompt: scan the codebase for security vulnerabilities
expectations: Checks for OWASP Top 10 vulnerability categories
Reports findings with severity: Critical, High, Medium, Low
Includes file path and line number for each finding
Provides a remediation suggestion for each finding

cases.prompt: check if we have any hardcoded API keys or credentials in the code
expectations: Searches for patterns matching API keys, tokens, passwords, and secrets
Reports any hardcoded credentials as Critical severity
Checks both source files and configuration files

cases.description: Authentication code triggers auth-specific security checks
cases.prompt: check the authentication implementation for security issues
expectations: Checks for missing authentication on sensitive routes
Checks for insecure session handling
Checks for SQL injection risks in auth queries
Checks for timing attacks in password comparison

cases.description: Dependency vulnerability check triggers the skill
cases.prompt: audit our dependencies for known vulnerabilities
expectations: Checks package.json or equivalent for dependency versions
Identifies packages with known CVEs
Reports severity level for each vulnerable dependency
Activates the security scan skill
Reviews API endpoints for authentication and input validation issues

cases.description: General code quality review should trigger code-review, not security-scan
cases.prompt: review this PR for code quality and best practices
expectations: Does NOT invoke the security-scan skill
Does NOT produce OWASP-categorized security findings

cases.description: Code cleanup should NOT trigger security scan
cases.prompt: remove dead code from the utils module
expectations: Does NOT invoke the security-scan skill
Does NOT produce security vulnerability reports
